channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Same shit different day, 7th April
item.description:

item.title: Carpet, fish tank & plastic panel fly tipped., 7th April
item.description:
Carpet, fish tank & plastic panel and car seat with 2 x children's toys have been dumped next to the large blue recycling bins.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Monk Street, Woolwich

item.title: A dead fox has been located and placed on the grass vege on the north side of of the highway at no 78 Camden Park Road., 7th April
item.description:
The fox was identified at 0750 on 7 April 2026. The removal of the animal constitutes street cleanliness and hygiene matter of some urgency.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Camden Park Road, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Again & Again - Overfilled Public Waste bin, 7th April
item.description:
There is an ongoing issue with missed and insufficient bin collections outside One Stop Hazel Walk. The current collection frequency is not adequate, causing the bins to overflow quickly, especially as residents from nearby flats are using them to dispose of personal household waste. This situation is now negatively affecting the nearby shop, as overflowing waste is attracting pests that may enter the store, creating serious hygiene concerns. As a community shop, maintaining cleanliness is essential for both staff and customers. Additionally, dog waste and general rubbish are being left around the bin area, leading to an unsanitary and unpleasant environment. The bins and surrounding ground are also becoming damaged. It is clear that the current collection arrangements are not sufficient, and urgent action is required to improve waste management and maintain proper hygiene standards in the area.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hazel Walk, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bins overflowing and fly tipping, 7th April
item.description:
And then clearly animals getting at it.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wentworth Gardens, Southgate
